name: data-phinter-workflows
description: Recover context and generate, audit, verify, repair, and accumulate Data Phin-ter SST data.

interface.shortDescription: Run Data Phin-ter generation and verified intake workflows.
interface.longDescription: Provides project-context recovery, NotebookLM candidate generation, app-owned SST audit and accumulation, and Shopee recovery. Handoff writing remains owner-maintained outside the plugin.
defaultPrompt: Load the Data Phin-ter project context and continue.
Run a new NotebookLM SST candidate-data cycle.
Audit the selected SST candidate status and proceed only if it is eligible.
